economic_mechanism: Gradual information diffusion and trend-following demand may cause a completed close at least 2% above the prior completed 20-session high, while above a fully warmed prior-completed SMA100, to retain positive fixed-ten-session underlying continuation versus earlier same-symbol near-high non-breakout controls.
candidate_or_family_scope: MULTINAME_BREAKOUT_BULL_CALL_14D_V1 / TIME_SERIES_20D_BREAKOUT_CONTINUATION on the frozen AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN, META, GOOGL, AMD, TSLA adjusted-close panel; next-session entry after the completed-bar signal; prior-only same-symbol controls matched without replacement; non-overlapping pair windows; chronological 60/40 blueprint split; one-lot future 14-DTE $1-wide bull-call debit spread is structural only, capital_fit_usd=max_loss_usd=100, max_lots=1 before closing friction.
falsifier: On the chronological first 60% of the frozen matched blueprints: fewer than 80 pairs or 6 represented symbols, non-positive treated mean after the labeled symmetric 20-bps underlying absolute-level sensitivity, non-positive paired excess, non-positive one-sided 90% five-pair-block bootstrap lower bound, or any chronology, reuse, overlap, or match-bound violation closes the exact family.

strategy_advancement.summary: The mandatory prior-epoch three-wake no-advance burst stop was resolved by an accurate written reassessment, a new evidence-class epoch, and a materially different prior-only within-symbol event-study implementation. The frozen retest passed all six train checks with 168 pairs across eight symbols, +1.5533% paired excess, and +0.2947% LB90, advancing only F0_MECHANISM to F1_TRAIN under L0. Holdout 113 remains outcome-unread and option pricing remains zero.

search_information.summary: This wake replaced threshold variation inside exhausted cross-sectional/event-calendar designs with a prior-only within-symbol event-time continuation design, exercised it in-wake, preserved the narrow pooled advance, and repaired final claim semantics plus epoch-orientation integrity after challenger/finalizer review.

useful_deltas.summary: Built and finalizer-hardened the breakout train lab: strict chronology/holdout boundaries, explicit fixed-horizon versus untested managed-path semantics, approximate 10-session/14-DTE alignment, symmetric-cost cancellation warning, mandatory non-gating holdout concentration diagnostics, and an explicit thin-breadth negative control; also corrected the prior-epoch reassessment/config truth.

Exercised the frozen multi-name breakout continuation family and preserved a narrow pooled F1 train advance: 281 outcome-independent blueprints, 168 train pairs across eight symbols, +1.5533% paired excess, +0.2947% LB90, zero integrity violations, 113 holdout rows outcome-unread, and zero option-pricing calls; concentration diagnostics prevent universal or robust-paper overclaim.

Honored the prior epoch's three-wake no-advance burst stop, kept its exact closed families quarantined, and opened the time-series-breakout-payoff epoch with exactly one frozen holdout continuation seed rather than resuming threshold churn.

critic_findings.finding: The pooled train pass is concentration-fragile: MSFT/NVDA paired means are negative, leave-TSLA-out LB90 is negative, and only the middle chronological tertile has a positive LB90.
critic_findings.rationale: The payload now predeclares per-symbol, leave-one-symbol-out, and chronological-tertile diagnostics as mandatory non-gating reporting if the untouched holdout is opened; final readiness and wake surfaces explicitly reject universal-by-symbol, temporal-uniformity, or TSLA-independence claims.

critic_findings.finding: The fixed ten-session outcome had been described as if the proposed early invalidation and 50%-of-maximum option management were simulated.
critic_findings.rationale: Exit and management fields now distinguish the measured fixed-ten-session underlying outcome from an explicitly untested future option plan.

critic_findings.finding: A ten-session underlying continuation result does not establish payoff capture for a 14-DTE debit spread.
critic_findings.rationale: The machine-readable payload and derived surfaces now label the relationship as approximate directional pre-screening only and disclaim theta, vega, bid/ask, option-cost, and managed-exit evidence.

critic_findings.finding: Symmetric 20-bps subtraction cancels from treated-minus-control excess and is not a differential friction or option-cost robustness test.
critic_findings.rationale: Claim scope now identifies it as symmetric absolute-level underlying sensitivity, states that it does not stress paired excess, and rejects any option execution-cost interpretation.

critic_findings.finding: Minimum-symbol breadth needed an explicit adversarial test, and holdout serialization had to remain outcome-free.
critic_findings.rationale: A new negative control constructs otherwise passing return/bootstrap evidence in one symbol and proves the breadth gate fails when two are required; existing strict-JSON tests continue to prove no holdout outcome metric is serialized.

critic_findings.finding: Executor full-suite success was self-attested and required independent finalizer verification.
critic_findings.rationale: This was an evidence requirement rather than a code defect. The finalizer independently ran focused 8/8, adjacent 29/29, compile, exact substantive reproduction, coverage, platform smoke, and the full 312/312 suite; exact commands and results are recorded in learning-promotion.md.

critic_findings.finding: NEXT must prevent option pricing or retuning before a one-shot untouched holdout decision.
critic_findings.rationale: The merged NEXT already preserves the frozen 281-blueprint geometry, opens the reserved 113 exactly once, keeps concentration diagnostics non-gating, and prohibits option pricing unless F2 advances; no corrective machinery was required.

data_dependencies: Frozen adjusted-close cache inputs for the exact eight-symbol 2016-01-01 to end-exclusive 2026-07-15 panel
Reserved final 113 outcome-independent blueprints reconstructed under the unchanged matcher and read exactly once
No option marks or option surfaces unless the untouched pooled holdout advances F1_TRAIN to F2_UNTOUCHED_HOLDOUT
next: BREAKOUT_UNTOUCHED_HOLDOUT_ONCE: reconstruct the exact frozen 281 blueprints under unchanged panel, signal, match bounds, horizon, and 20-bps label; select the reserved final 113 without retuning; read outcomes exactly once; decide F1 to F2 advance or FAMILY_CLOSED under the unchanged pooled discovery gate; mandatorily report per-symbol, leave-one-symbol-out, and chronological-tertile concentration diagnostics as non-gating context; price no options unless holdout advances; no registry, seat, paper, shadow, arm, broker, or live.
